channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Infinite Jump
item.description: This mod lets you jump like Kirby in Super Smash Bros, but Infinitely! It is a cheat mod.

item.title: SheyderMod
item.description: A simple SheyderMod that supports the original artstyle of the game.

item.title: Resonator Overhaul
item.description: Per-resonator volume, falloff and looping — saved to the world and audible with Music off.

item.title: Rope Bridges Continued
item.description: Adds beautiful Rope Bridges, Continued version, Improves upon the original mod

item.title: Equus: Medieval Horses
item.description: Adds a medieval warhorse to the game that can be purchased from a new horse trader

item.title: Sandy Plaster
item.description: Adds lath and plaster variants for each sand type

item.title: Hook Molds
item.description: This mod adds two molds for hooks for the Butchering Mod

item.title: Temporal Stabilizer
item.description: A craftable, placeable machine that makes an area genuinely immune to temporal-stability drain.

item.title: Firearms fork
item.description: 1.22 Fork

item.title: Overhaul lib legacy compatibility
item.description: Compat for firearms, crossbows, combatoverhaul

item.title: Diamond Tools
item.description: Diamond tools and Item Magnet made for Skyblock Server

item.title: Quartermaster
item.description: Craft a Quartermaster's Desk that acts as a remote terminal for every container around it.

item.title: Biodiversity: Crops
item.description: Adds several new growable crops on farmland tiles. Part of the Biodiversity Suite

item.title: Wild West Climate
item.description: Makes the west drier, hotter, and more desert-like as you travel across the world.

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Downed
item.description: Replaces the vanilla downed state with a survivable, invulnerable downed state. Quite bloody.

item.title: Pico TrashSlot
item.description: A seamless trash slot that docks to your inventory for quickly deleting unwanted items.

item.title: Metals of Myths [ALPHA]
item.description: An addon for Improved Metallurgy that extends progression even further by adding fantasy metals.

item.title: Shipwright
item.description: Adds various sailed and rowed boats from all around the world.

item.title: World Border
item.description: Prevent players from going too far away

item.title: Elk Adornments
item.description: Masks for you and your elk with Modular Elk Armor!

item.title: Rookhaven Bloomery Iron Bloom Fix
item.description: Fix for Rookhaven Server for Bloomeries making instant ingots instead of Blooms

item.title: TraderShopFix
item.description: Fixes of few small things that really annoyed me inside a trader shop

item.title: RentalPermission
item.description: Server-side rentals for configured reinforced or locked blocks inside configured claims.

item.title: Fixes for Salvation Engine Server
item.description: Fixes for Salvation Engine Server

item.title: Empty Village
item.description: Adds empty villages to world generation

item.title: Mini's Assorted Patches
item.description: Buncha changes for a LAN

item.title: Wildcraft x Expanded Foods Compatability
item.description: A work-in-progress mod that aims to act as a bridge between Wildcraft: F&N + Expanded Foods

item.title: VintageRebornfix
item.description: for Vintage Reborn server

item.title: Rock Trader
item.description: Just a trader to sell stones and rocks
